case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-60s currencyservice metrics. Latency.p50 (+1.9) and latency.p90 (+0.7) anomalies persist. Traces show Convert operation latency.p99 (+2.3) and self_p99 (+2.3) spikes. CPU remains normal (dev=-0.6). Root cause remains currencyservice latency.
